purpose: Prioritized backlog status update based on actual code inspection. Apply these statuses to docs/product/backlog.json when full-file editing is available safely.
source_of_truth_note: docs/product/backlog.json remains the formal source of truth. This file is a safe update layer because the GitHub connector truncates backlog.json and direct overwrite could lose data.
priority_strategy: First stabilize demo APK and Android TV QA.
Then finish user-provided torrent/.torrent/TorrServer flow because the foundation already exists.
Then complete source search/manager and Continue Watching.
Then QR import and AI provider.
Then polish personal library, settings, backup, privacy and stable release packaging.

next_highest_priority_work.title: Run Android TV build/install smoke test
next_highest_priority_work.reason: Foundation exists but not verified on device/CI; without this, READY_FOR_QA items cannot become DONE.

next_highest_priority_work.title: Torrent file input real metadata path
next_highest_priority_work.reason: .torrent file picker and import object exist, but real bencode/TorrServer metadata flow is not complete.

next_highest_priority_work.title: Torrent metadata and file selection from real engine/TorrServer
next_highest_priority_work.reason: Mock metadata exists; real multi-file metadata is needed for actual use.

next_highest_priority_work.title: Torrent player integration via TorrServer stream URL
next_highest_priority_work.reason: TorrServer adapter can build stream URL, but UI flow does not yet hand off real playable torrent stream to ExoPlayer.

next_highest_priority_work.title: Real Continue Watching UX
next_highest_priority_work.reason: Native progress persistence exists, but real home/list/resume prompt UX is unfinished.

next_highest_priority_work.title: Harden source-backed search and normalization
next_highest_priority_work.reason: Parser/source foundation exists but needs production hardening and dedupe/ranking.

next_highest_priority_work.title: Real QR phone import session
next_highest_priority_work.reason: Only placeholder UI exists; QR import is a key non-technical user feature.

next_highest_priority_work.title: Real AI provider integration
next_highest_priority_work.reason: AI UI/mock exists, but no real provider or generation flow.

implementation_notes: Android TV project exists with package com.asgard.tv.
Manifest includes Leanback launcher category, app label/icon/banner, INTERNET permission and WebView MainActivity.
build.gradle.kts uses compileSdk/targetSdk 35, minSdk 23, versionName 2.9.3.
Remaining: verify APK build/install on Android TV or Mi Box S.
Web UI loads input.js/nav.js and focusable controls.
MainActivity routes Android Back to window.asgardBack.
Remaining: physical remote QA for focus traps and Back behavior.
remaining_work: check Back behavior on all screens

implementation_notes: Home, hero, shelves, Continue Watching mock and navigation links exist in main.js.
Still uses mock data in key areas.
remaining_work: connect Home to real history/favorites/watchlist/new episodes

implementation_notes: Premium dark TV visual style, cards, shelves, focus styling and cinematic UI language exist.
Needs final consistency/readability QA.
No complete first-launch onboarding flow confirmed in code.
Some empty/error/loading panels and retry placeholders exist across Web UI and torrent/source flows.
Coverage is not consistent across all major screens.
main.js contains mock movies/series, mock metadata, detail page and player navigation.
Search UI exists.
Mock search exists.
source-search.js patches Search to use active parser and enabled sources.
sources.js provides parsing, classification, normalization, querySource/searchContent and diagnostics.
source-search.js integrates active parser, source reports, playable/torrent/magnet results and TorrServer action.
Still needs production hardening, dedupe/ranking and real configured parser QA.
Search filter chips exist visually, but full filters and Android TV voice input are not confirmed.
Detail page UI exists with title/year/genre/rating/description, actions and actor mock list.
Series mock cards, episodes screen and season chips exist.
Actor mock list and trailer placeholder exist.
Sources screen foundation, sources.js parser and persistence helpers exist.
sources.js parses TXT-style rows, handles comments/empty rows, validates types and can serialize sources.
sources.js implements source classification/search/diagnostics.
JacRed/Torznab adapters and parser manager exist.
Adapter concept is implemented in JS, though not as a formal TypeScript/Kotlin interface.
source-diagnostics.js and parser-settings.js provide source/parser diagnostics and status reporting.
sources.txt contains public/demo sources and disabled user-configured placeholders only.
parsers.json contains disabled placeholders only.
TorrServer actions require user confirmation.
PlayerActivity uses Media3 ExoPlayer.
Supports URL handoff, play/pause, D-pad seek, media rewind/fast-forward and progress save.
Native D-pad seek and web mock timeline exist.
Native watch_progress persistence and JS store helpers exist; Home has mock Continue Watching row.
No full implementation confirmed beyond UI references.
openExternalUrl exists, but full external player selection/fallback flow is not confirmed.
QR import UI placeholder exists.
Security requirements exist in backlog but no real session/token implementation confirmed.
AI UI/mock summary exists in main.js.
Static recommendation-style copy exists.
AI picker screen exists with mock output.
Mock episodes/calendar UI exists.
Parser settings exist, but real AI provider/API key settings are not confirmed.
Favorites bridge/store helpers exist.
Watchlist is referenced in UI/backlog but full implementation is not confirmed.
History bridge/store helpers exist.
Profile/parental references exist, but data separation is not confirmed.
torrent.js implements magnet validation, infoHash extraction, dn/tr/ws parsing and task creation.
UI supports adding magnet tasks.
MainActivity has ACTION_OPEN_DOCUMENT file picker for torrent files.
Manifest accepts file/content application/x-bittorrent and octet-stream.
pending_torrent_file_import stores uri, name and size.
torrent.js validates .torrent import and creates torrent_file task.
Real bencode parsing is not implemented; metadata remains pending/mock after input.
remaining_work: real metadata parse or TorrServer add

implementation_notes: torrent.js provides mock metadata, video extension detection, default largest video selection and manual selection.
TorrServer adapter can fetch metadata/files, but UI is not fully wired to real TorrServer metadata.
remaining_work: real metadata from TorrServer or parser

implementation_notes: stream.js and torrent.js implement streaming/buffer/no-peers/cancel state layer, but no real P2P engine or local stream server.
TorrServer adapter can build stream URL; embedded player can open URLs; real UI handoff is not complete.
remaining_work: send selected torrent file stream URL to ExoPlayer

implementation_notes: Torrent diagnostics and buffer state UI exist; cache/storage management is not complete.
Settings screen exists; Parser & TorrServer settings are functional.
No full backup/export/import flow confirmed.
Parser API key masking exists in UI; full secure native storage and privacy controls are not complete.
Source diagnostics and parser/TorrServer diagnostics exist. Device-wide diagnostics are not complete.
Developer-like diagnostics exist in UI, but full logs export/redaction is not implemented.

status_updates.product_area: Smoke test and Mi Box S QA
implementation_notes: No evidence of completed physical device QA in repository.

status_updates.title: GitHub update check screen
status_updates.description: Implement GitHub Releases update check screen.
acceptance_criteria: App does not silently install APK.
definition_of_done: User confirmation is required before installing any APK.
implementation_notes: updates.js and updates-ui.js implement GitHub Releases check and external release page opening.
Android openExternalUrl() is available.
Full APK download/install flow is not implemented.
Build foundation exists, but stable APK artifact and release QA are not confirmed.
README has build instructions; full non-programmer install/update guide is not complete.
